finding_results.notes: Removed dream/vision consolation and closed on unresolved constraints plus immediate dawn action planning while Tom remains missing and roads remain closed.
Added an explicit pre-evening strategic pivot: Elsie writes a named dawn split plan that reallocates who will search and where.
Expanded post-confession aftermath with embodied aftereffects, an awkward silence beat, and a failed first attempt to speak before reassurance arrives.
Replaced the humorless-laugh shorthand at the trauma peak with breath-break and bodily control detail tied directly to the stillbirth recounting.

summary: Chapter 4 now holds unresolved pressure through the ending, introduces a concrete causal search pivot before retreat, and deepens the confession aftermath with embodied consequence while preserving character voice and continuity constraints.
